rejected_candidates.title: Historical victim authorization is replayable without fresh binding to the current order
rejected_candidates.reason: Merged into `F-001`: the historical victim-context replay is the concrete consequence of the forged-offset parser-confusion issue, not a separate root cause.

rejected_candidates.title: Resolver hook is an always-successful no-op that validates nothing except caller address
rejected_candidates.reason: Too speculative as a standalone report: the current codebase never configures or uses this contract as an active resolver in a concrete asset-moving path, so realistic protocol impact is not established.
